---
title: "HW-2"
author: "Jordan Sutherland"
date: "2/6/2022"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

2.

```{r}
qchisq(0.95,4)
qchisq(0.05,4)
```

3. c)

```{r}
qchisq(0.975,14)
qchisq(0.025,14)
```

4. a)

```{r}
qnorm(0.01,lower.tail=FALSE)
```

5.

```{r}
qt(0.025,34, lower.tail=FALSE)
```
